results.title: HKSAR V. CHOW CHI (AKA CHOW CHI-LUN)
results.parties: HKSAR v CHOW Chi (also known as CHOW Chi-lun)
results.charge: Offences: (1)  to (5)  Procurement of unlawful sexual act by false pretences [1] （以虛假藉口促致他人作非法的性行為） (6)  Possessing a false instrument [2] （管有虛假文書） (7)  Improper possession of clothing of police officer [3] （不適當地管有警務人員的服裝）
results.representations: Present: Mr. Anson Lai, PP, of the Department of Justice, for HKSAR. Mr. Chan Siu Ming instructed by M/s Eric Cheung & Lau, assigned by the Director of Legal Aid, for the defendant.

results.title: HKSAR V. TAM WAI TSUNG
results.coram: Before: Deputy District Judge Terence Wai
results.parties: HKSAR v TAM WAI TSUNG Defendant
results.charge: Offence: [1] Obtaining property by deception（以欺騙手段取得財產） [2] Procurement of unlawful sexual act by false pretences（以虛假藉口促致他人作非法的性行為）
results.representations: Present: Mr. Ivan TAN, Public Prosecutor, for HKSAR Ms. Joyce LAI, instructed by Deannie Yew and Associates, assigned by DLA, for the defendant
